name: Swedish Ginger Cookies (Pepparkakor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat molasses in a small saucepan until boiling.
2. Boil for 1 minute.
3. Add sugar and butter, stirring until the butter is melted. Allow to cool.
4. Beat in the egg.
5. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda, ginger, and cinnamon.
6. Mix the dry ingredients into the molasses mixture thoroughly.
7. Cover tightly and refrigerate overnight.
8. Roll out a portion of the dough on a lightly floured pastry cloth until thin.
9. Cut into desired shapes.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 6 to 8 minutes.
11. Yield: Approximately 10 dozen cookies.
Note: The dough can be shaped into a roll and wrapped in waxed paper. Refrigerate overnight or longer. Slice thinly and bake in a moderate oven (350°F). Store in an air-tight container; the flavor will mature over time.
